requiredInferenceFieldsArtifact.label: gemma-3-1b-it-f16-af32.inference
errors:
Manifest "gemma-3-1b-it-f16-af32.inference" has incomplete inference config. Missing required fields:
  - attention.queryKeyNorm is required
  - attention.attentionBias is required
  - attention.causal is required
  - attention.slidingWindow must be explicitly set (null for no sliding window, or number)
  - attention.attnLogitSoftcapping must be explicitly set (null for no softcapping, or number)
  - normalization.rmsNormWeightOffset is required
  - normalization.rmsNormEps is required
  - normalization.postAttentionNorm is required
  - normalization.preFeedforwardNorm is required
  - normalization.postFeedforwardNorm is required
  - ffn.activation is required
  - ffn.gatedActivation is required
  - ffn.swigluLimit must be explicitly set (null for no limit, or number)
  - rope.ropeTheta is required
  - rope.ropeScalingFactor is required (use 1.0 for no scaling)
  - rope.ropeScalingType must be explicitly set (null for no scaling, or scaling type string)
  - rope.ropeLocalTheta must be explicitly set (null for no local theta, or number)
  - rope.mropeInterleaved is required
  - rope.mropeSection must be explicitly set (null when unused, or an array of positive integers)
  - rope.partialRotaryFactor must be explicitly set (null when unused, or a number in (0, 1])
  - output.tieWordEmbeddings is required
  - output.scaleEmbeddings is required
  - output.embeddingTranspose is required
  - output.finalLogitSoftcapping must be explicitly set (null for no softcapping, or number)
  - output.embeddingVocabSize must be explicitly set (null to use architecture.vocabSize, or number)
  - layerPattern.type is required
  - layerPattern.globalPattern must be explicitly set (null if not applicable)
  - layerPattern.period must be explicitly set (null if not applicable)
  - layerPattern.offset must be explicitly set (null if not applicable)
  - rope.yarnBetaFast must be explicitly set (null if not YARN)
  - rope.yarnBetaSlow must be explicitly set (null if not YARN)
  - rope.yarnOriginalMaxPos must be explicitly set (null if not YARN)
Re-convert the model using the latest converter.
